task_objective: Generate 20M x 20col financial report and optimize for large datasets
design_decisions: Implemented OOM prevention for large datasets (>1M rows) by skipping Spearman correlation and Monotonicity checks.
Spearman and Monotonicity are O(n log n) or involve complex window functions that scale poorly on massive tables in memory-constrained environments.
Maintained Pearson correlation and Missingness Matrix/Heatmap as they scale better via DuckDB aggregates.
Created scripts/profile_20M_financial.py to generate and profile a 1.4GB 20M-row dataset.
results: Successfully profiled 20M rows in 55.7s without OOM. Pearson correlations and all other sections (except Spearman/Monotonicity) are present.
